# jellyfin_api_keys (Data Source)

Lists all Jellyfin API keys.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_api_keys" "all" {}

output "api_key_app_names" {
  value = [for k in data.jellyfin_api_keys.all.keys : k.app_name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `keys` (Attributes List, Sensitive) The list of API keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys))

<a id="nestedatt--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys`

Read-Only:

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) The API key access token.
- `app_name` (String) The application name.
- `date_created` (String) The date the API key was created.
